code:
%%{Infra_WorkerNode}}}%%

stateDiagram-v2
    [Infra_IngressController] --> Idle
    
    Idle --> Monitoring: CRON tick / YieldSnapshot event
    
    Monitoring --> Comparing: Collect APY data
    
    Comparing --> NoAction: APY diff < 0.5%
    Comparing --> SmallRebalance: APY diff >= 0.5% && change < 50%
    Comparing --> LargeRebalance: APY diff >= 0.5% && change >= 50%
    
    NoAction --> Idle: emit RebalanceSkipped
    
    SmallRebalance --> Executing: emit Callback(Infra_WorkerNode)
    
    LargeRebalance --> PendingFinality: Queue rebalance
    PendingFinality --> PendingFinality: Wait 64 blocks
    PendingFinality --> Executing: Finality reached
    
    Executing --> Completed: Rebalance executed
    Completed --> Idle: Reset
    
    note right of Monitoring
        Every ~12 minutes
        or on manual trigger
    end note
    
    note right of PendingFinality
        Safety measure for
        large TVL changes
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个WorkerNode的rebalance状态机。核心是从Idle开始，每12分钟或者收到YieldSnapshot事件就进入Monitoring状态采集APY数据。
明白，入口是IngressController触发Idle对吧？Monitoring之后呢，直接执行rebalance吗？
不是，要先Comparing比对APY差异。这里分三种情况：差异小于0.5%就走NoAction回到Idle；等于0.5%且变化量小于50%是SmallRebalance；等于50%就是LargeRebalance。
好的，NoAction会emit RebalanceSkipped回到Idle。SmallRebalance直接emit Callback给WorkerNode执行。那LargeRebalance呢，也是直接执行吗？
LargeRebalance有个安全机制，要先进入PendingFinality等待64个区块确认，达到Finality才能执行。这是为了防止大额TVL变动的风险。
理解了，PendingFinality有个自循环等待区块，然后到Executing，执行完到Completed，最后Reset回Idle。我加两个注释说明Monitoring的周期和PendingFinality的安全用途。
稍等，SmallRebalance那条线应该是直接到Executing，不是到PendingFinality。还有Executing到Completed的触发条件是Rebalance executed，不是Callback。
已修正，SmallRebalance直接emit Callback进入Executing，Executing完成Rebalance executed后进入Completed。现在状态流转都对了。
没问题了，Idle、Monitoring、Comparing、NoAction、SmallRebalance、LargeRebalance、PendingFinality、Executing、Completed这几个状态完整覆盖了rebalance的全生命周期。
